name: Shark Amandine
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly brown the almonds in the butter and set aside.
2. Rub both sides of the shark fillets with the sherry.
3. Sprinkle the fillets with pepper.
4. Spoon some of the butter mixture over each fillet.
5. Place the fillets on a broiler pan and broil for 5 to 10 minutes, depending on thickness. Ensure they are cooked through but not dry; if needed, turn them over and continue broiling until done.
6. Remove to a serving platter.
7. Sprinkle with the almonds, bacon, and green onions.
8. Garnish with lemon wedges.
